allow: Bash(docker exec new_server-web-1 python manage.py check*)
Bash(docker exec new_server-web-1 python manage.py migrate*)
Bash(docker exec new_server-web-1 python manage.py collectstatic*)
Bash(docker exec new_server-web-1 python manage.py showmigrations*)

hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ]; then printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "You are on the main branch. Create a feature branch first with: git checkout -b <branch-name>"}'; fi
echo '{"systemMessage": "Remember to update CLAUDE.md if anything significant changed today."}'
